title.en: Of course, once you meet it, it's a good opport...

content.en:
Ye Tian was immersed in the vision, and felt the use of various powers presented by the vision, which was of great use to him in creating the supreme technique of time and space.

He has now stepped into the second level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, and has embarked on the path of space-time fusion.

Soon, as the years passed, the battle vision dissipated completely, and was no longer to be repeated.

"The vision is gone!"

Ye Tian felt a little pity, it would be nice if such a chance vision had always existed, but it could only exist for such a short time, and there was no law.

Of course, once you meet it, it's a good opportunity.

Ye Tian felt that the fighter fate he encountered this time should belong to an ordinary fate, and there should be a better chance.

"No wonder so many peak legendary realm lords are willing to send a clone into the mist corridor, this benefit is indeed great, although sending a doppelganger in is equivalent to a loss of combat power, but under normal circumstances, the peak legend realm lords will not fight with each other, it is better to let a clone enter the mist corridor. "

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to walk aimlessly in the misty corridor, occasionally discovering a vision.

Moreover, Ye Tian only left one copy body, and after the other copy body disbanded, he re-entered the Black Saint Mountain.

After entering the Black Saint Mountain again, Ye Tian came to the Black Long River of the Black Saint Mountain.

Misty Corridor, he has already experienced it, now he can come to experience fishing, as for going to the sacrificial circle to comprehend the fusion of time and space, it is not in a hurry, after all, the body and several other replica bodies are still digesting the harvest of the last comprehension.

Ye Tian chose a rock, sat here cross-legged, and went fishing like a mortal.

He crafted a fishing rod at any time and began fishing.

However, any line that enters the black river will be melted away, and nothing will be left at all.

Not far away, a peak legendary realm lord saw this scene and reminded: "The black river does not allow everything, you can only use the power of time and space or a higher level of time and space control power to condense into fishing lines and hooks to fish, and fishing does not need bait, what you see is your control of the power of time and space or the power of time and space control, in short, you will understand when you fish." "

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

In an instant, Ye Tian condensed into a fishing line with the power of space-time control that had just been condensed, and entered the long black river.

Suddenly, the situation inside the Black Long River was perceived by Ye Tian through the power of time and space control.

This black long river was like a turn under Ye Tian's perception, and those fish seemed to be cultivators in the black long river world, and he, as an angler, was an existence beyond the world, and a cultivator who crossed the world to catch these fish would naturally be resisted by the whole world and those fish.

Moreover, these fish live in the deepest part of the Black River World, and the deeper the silk threads made by the power of space-time control penetrate into the Black River, the more difficult it is to control, and even crumble.

If it is a silk thread condensed with the power of time and space, I am afraid it will be even more unbearable.

"It's very difficult, if you want to catch a fish in the black river, I'm afraid you need to be strong enough, or a certain amount of luck, most of the peak legend realm lords don't really want to catch a fish, but just use this black river to hone their power over time and space, or the power of time and space control. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Abrupt.

The silk thread of the space-time control power controlled by Ye Tian was shattered, but he was not disappointed, but was very happy, indicating that his control over the space-time control power was not good, and he still needed to hone one or two.

Next, Ye Tian's replica body was constantly fishing here, tempering his control over the power of time and space.

Time passed slowly, and one eternal epoch after another passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finished fishing, although he didn't catch a single fish, he had gained a lot, and his control over the power of time and space control had improved a lot.

"It's time to go to the time and space again, and the fusion of billions of time-space"

Ye Tian came to the sacrificial array, entered the interior of the sacrificial array, and put a large number of space-time treasures into the sacrificial altar for sacrifice.

Then, the altar devoured these space-time treasures.

The next moment, the scenes of time and space fusion were presented in front of him, allowing him to comprehend and comprehend.

And just like that, more than a hundred eternal years passed.

Although it was very short, Ye Tian gained a lot, and when the time came, he came out, and once again let the body and several replica bodies digest and comprehend, and improve the degree of space-time fusion.

In this way, Ye Tian's space-time fusion attainments are getting higher and higher, and more and more legendary power in his body has been transformed into space-time control power, which means that his cultivation is getting higher and higher, and his strength is getting stronger and stronger.

The effect of the first and second enlightenments of the sacrificial circle is okay, but after the third enlightenment, the effect is reduced a lot.

According to this kind of comprehension efficiency, after dozens of times at most, I am afraid that it will not have much effect.

Of course, even if it didn't have much effect, there were many peak Legendary Realm lords who came to the Black Saint Mountain again after a long time to comprehend, which could also have a little effect.

It can be said that at the peak Legendary Realm lord level, it is difficult to improve every bit of strength, because of (Wang Qian Zhao) and even if the price paid is very large, it can even be said that it is not worth it, they will do it.

In this way, Ye Tian successively participated in the Black Saint Mountain Sacrifice Array, and he comprehended many times, and the degree of space-time fusion became higher and higher, and the space-time control power contained in his body was naturally many, many.

However, he still hasn't created the Supreme Technique of the Temporal Space.

Only by creating the supreme technique of time and space can his strength step into the third level.

The space-time supreme technique combines the power of space-time control with the power of space-time, plus many ways of control, so as to create a supreme technique that surpasses the top and the highest.

"'Your next goal is to create a space-time supreme skill!'"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

When Ye Tian's replica body was walking in the misty corridor, he suddenly encountered an astonishing vision.
